metadata.description: Internal permission classifier for Claude Code — eliminates permission prompts while blocking dangerous operations

plugins.name: auto-mode
plugins.description: Internal permission classifier. Activated BEFORE every tool call — evaluates safety, performance impact, and security risk. Hard-deny destructive operations. Auto-allow safe operations within project scope. Minimize permission prompts to near-zero by classifying commands in context. Use for permission management, safety, security, auto-approval.
